bead.title: agent/test: migrate first half of execute_bead_loop_test.go to RunWithConfig
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Mechanical migration of ~12 ExecuteBeadLoopOptions literals in the first half of cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go to use config.NewTestConfigForLoop + RunWithConfig.

Split per round-3 review: file is 1041 LoC with 23 literals. Splitting at the function boundary nearest the midpoint.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go (first half only — agree split point in PR description)

Out-of-scope:
- Second half (bead 11b)
- Any production change (already landed in beads 6/7)
bead.acceptance: rg 'ExecuteBeadLoopOptions\\{' cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go | wc -l shows ~11 remaining (the second half's literals). cd cli && go test -run 'cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test' ./internal/agent/... passes. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
